purpose: Optional, informational composition of the disjoint portfolio-agent evaluation dataset suites for regression runs. This manifest does not modify eval.yaml and is not wired into any evaluator or orchestration script; it only documents how the suites relate so a future add-eval-orchestration/implement-eval-suites owner can compose a regression run without re-deriving suite scope from scratch.

composed_suites.name: smoke-core
composed_suites.evaluation_mode: unspecified/open_question (see .foundry/eval-invocation-design.json open_questions_for_downstream_owners: whether candidate_response is authoritative trace/dataset grading or advisory)

composed_suites.name: portfolio-smoke
composed_suites.evaluation_mode: mixed per-row (agent_target for ambiguity/missing-id/out-of-scope cases that do not require tenant-grounded facts; trace_dataset for valid list/summary/position cases and simulated tool/backend failure cases that require verified seeded facts or deterministic failure conditions). See each row's evaluation_mode field.

composed_suites.name: portfolio-tenant-safety
composed_suites.evaluation_mode: mostly trace_dataset (cross-tenant, spoofed-authority, and session-reuse cases require verified per-item trusted context and structural tool_call/tool_output assertions that the managed azure_ai_agent target cannot carry); a few pure-refusal hidden-context/tool-bypass cases use agent_target since they assert no tool call / no disclosure rather than tenant-grounded facts. See each row's evaluation_mode field.
composed_suites.structural_assertion_note: Per .foundry/eval-invocation-design.json tool_to_evaluator_mapping.tenant_isolation_dimension_recommendation, every trace_dataset row in this suite should be paired with a deterministic (non-LLM-judge) check that tool_call tenant arguments equal the row's authenticated_tenant and that tool_output never contains another tenant's seeded portfolio/position identifiers.

composed_suites.name: portfolio-tool-diagnostics
composed_suites.evaluation_mode: trace_dataset for all rows (tool selection/argument/output assertions require verified per-item tenant context and captured tool_calls, which the managed azure_ai_agent target cannot supply per-item). See each row's evaluation_mode field.

composition_guidance.for_full_regression_run: A regression composition may concatenate all four suites' JSONL files, but each row already carries a self-sufficient evaluation_mode/evaluation_level/expected_tool_calls/forbidden_outcomes contract, so no suite requires re-tagging before inclusion.
composition_guidance.disjointness_note: This manifest and its suite folders are additive only. datasets/smoke-core/smoke-core_dg.jsonl and evaluators/smoke-core/rubric_dimensions.json are unmodified and untouched by this todo.
composition_guidance.not_wired_into_eval_yaml: eval.yaml is unmodified by this todo and still declares only the smoke-core dataset/evaluator pair. Registering additional suites in eval.yaml (or successor per-suite eval files) is explicitly out of scope for author-eval-datasets and is owned by implement-eval-suites.
